entries.answer: Use .bl event to see the active event, .bl join <event> to join, and .bl score for your standing. Admins can validate an event before starting it.
Use .bl score for your live score, .bl top for current standings, or .bl results last for the latest immutable result.
Stable settings are in config/BattleLuck/battleluck.json. Each event owns one events/<eventId>.json file. Invalid candidates are rejected before becoming live.
BattleLuck is server-side. Native chat always works. Players who already run ZUI may opt in with .bl ui zui and return with .bl ui native.
AI-lite is embedded and free. The optional local adapter uses an OpenAI-compatible/Ollama endpoint and defaults to qwen2.5:0.5b; gameplay never depends on it.

The developer bridge reads bounded allowlisted projections and produces validated action proposals. Static/model simulation is the default; dev-arena or live execution requires explicit scoped confirmation.
